Off Calendar Feb-28-2018 Continued To Apr-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Concerning Internal Affairs Of Trust And For Order Construing Trustee Substitution Provision; Determining That Beneficiaries' Removal
Off Calendar Dec-06-2017 Continued To Feb-28-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Diamond appeared by telephone for Susan Meyer (Petitioner).
Joseph Brown appeared by telephone for Angele Strnad and First Republic Trust (Respondent).

Counsel reported that they had the opportunity to discuss the matter, that they were unable to reach agreement on substantive issues, that they want to take depositions and do discovery, and that they think they will ready for an evidentiary hearing in March. The Petition Concerning Internal Affairs of Trust, etc. is continued to February 28, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects the Parties to complete discovery, to have met and conferred as to what the evidentiary hearing will encompass, and to determine what facts they can stipulate to, who the witnesses will be, how many exhibits they will have and how long the evidentiary hearing will be. A joint statement as to the above is to be filed by February 1, 2018.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
